delete.title: Confirm delete
delete.message: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}?
delete.message_generic: Are you sure you want to delete this item?

dependency_install.title: Install optional sidecars
dependency_install.lead: These sidecars enable extra features (context-hub search / code-graph analysis). You can skip and re-run from Settings → Runtime later.
dependency_install.venv_note: If an active Python venv is detected, install goes into the venv (avoids global system install).

onboarding.analysis_failed_hint: Click Skip to start with an empty template.
onboarding.analysis_done_desc: Does this look right? Review and apply.
onboarding.empty_template_hint: Only empty template files will be created
onboarding.cancel_confirm_lead: Canceling leaves the project in this state:
onboarding.cancel_confirm_folder_created: Project folder structure is already created
onboarding.cancel_confirm_claude_md_empty: CLAUDE.md stays as an empty template — agents start without project context
onboarding.cancel_confirm_no_index: Existing documentation index is not created
onboarding.cancel_confirm_later_tip: 💡 You can re-run analysis later from Settings > Project
onboarding.skip_confirm_lead: Instead, the following files will be created as blank templates:
onboarding.skip_confirm_agent_note: Agents will explore the code directly on first run to gather context.
onboarding.skip_confirm_rawq_note: rawq indexing continues in the background

meta_agent.title: Select meta agent
meta_agent.description_prefix: Choose the agent that will explore
meta_agent.skip_overlay_with_item_1_before: Reads the project structure and writes
meta_agent.skip_overlay_with_item_2_before: Summarizes the docs folder scan into
meta_agent.skip_overlay_without_item_2: Agents explore the code directly on first run
meta_agent.skip_overlay_without_item_3: You can re-run later from Settings → Project
meta_agent.ollama_install_hint: Install from https://ollama.com/download then run `ollama serve`
meta_agent.lmstudio_install_hint: Install from https://lmstudio.ai then start the Local Server

meta_chat.trigger_tooltip: Meta Agent (drag to move, long-press for inbox)
meta_chat.empty_state_primary: I can help analyze project status, detect issues, and suggest priorities.
